title: ANC - Switch from ANC Mode to Transparency Mode
scenario: Verify that switching from ANC Mode to Transparency Mode correctly disables ANC, greys out ANC options, and enables Transparency Mode with Environment selected by default on first switch.
steps: 2. Ensure the device is currently in ANC (Active Noise Cancellation) Mode.
3. Switch from ANC Mode to Transparency Mode.
4. Check that ANC is turned off.
5. Verify that ANC options (Adaptive/Standard) are disabled or greyed out.
6. Confirm that Transparency Mode is enabled.
7. On the first switch, verify that 'Environment' is selected by default.
expected: Switching from ANC Mode to Transparency Mode correctly turns off ANC, disables/greys out ANC options (Adaptive/Standard), and enables Transparency Mode with Environment selected by default on first switch.
